signals.headline: Kon Knueppel Named Kia NBA Eastern Conference Rookie of the Month | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kon Knueppel Named Kia NBA Eastern Conference Rookie of the Month | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The NBA announced today that Charlotte Hornets rookie forward **Kon Knueppel** has been named Kia NBA Eastern Conference Rookie of the Month, capping his superb rookie season with this honor and making him the first rookie in NBA history to achieve a never-before-done feat.[1][2]

signals.headline: Market-Moving Developments:**
signals.raw:
Market-Moving Developments:**

The key announcement is the central bank's **revised upward inflation forecast to 2.2% for 2026** (from an earlier 2.1% projection), driven by surging global oil prices[1]. This is significant because the BoK maintained its hawkish stance despite moderating headline inflation in early 2026, signaling concerns about persistent inflationary pressures[1][2].

signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Rate Steady Amid Rising Oil-Driven Inflation** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rate Steady Amid Rising Oil-Driven Inflation** | YES | HIGH confidence

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board held its benchmark interest rate at 2.5% for the 7th consecutive month on April 10, 2026, while raising inflation expectations due to Middle East conflict-related energy price shocks[3].
